# Role Descriptions — UW Facilities Business Intelligence Developer

## Independent Research & Primary Caregiver (2025–Present)

Left the workforce to serve as primary caregiver; built production BI infrastructure in parallel: normalized schemas, ETL pipelines, operational dashboards, and REST API integrations — all deployed and running. First-author in the *Journal of Glaciology* (2026); second manuscript under review at *Nature Food*.

## Accounts Receivable Specialist (Contract) — Randy's World-Wide (Mar–Aug 2025)

Short-term AR contract at a wholesale distributor; built Python data pipelines over Microsoft Great Plains ERP transaction data, designed a VBA-driven Excel reporting tool, and led a SmartConnect integration to automate a high-volume manual workflow.

## Administrative Aide (Finance & Operations) — University of Washington (2017–2022)

Five years supporting a University of Washington research department in finance and operations; managed the full AR cycle within UW's administrative systems, maintained records for compliance and audit readiness, and produced reporting across active grants and departmental accounts.

## Flightline Maintenance Craftsman — US Air Force (2008–2014)

Six years maintaining avionics systems on operational aircraft in the active-duty Air Force; zero-defect documentation environment with full accountability for data accuracy and regulatory compliance.
